final:
module RefModule(
	input [31:0] PC_M1,
	input [31:0] A_DATA,
	input [31:0] B_DATA,
	input [31:0] SEorZF,
	input        MA,
	input			 MB,
	output[31:0] BUS_A,
	output[31:0] BUS_B
    );reg [31:0]BUS_A_reg;
reg [31:0]BUS_B_reg;

assign BUS_A = BUS_A_reg;
assign BUS_B = BUS_B_reg;


always @(*) begin
  if(MA == 1) begin BUS_A_reg <= PC_M1 ; end
  if(MA == 0) begin BUS_A_reg <= A_DATA ; end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if(MB == 1) begin BUS_B_reg <= SEorZF ; end
  if(MB == 0) begin BUS_B_reg <= B_DATA ; end
  end

endmodule
